titleStmt.title: SII 27.355: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 355. (A.R. No. 319 of 1931-32.) KUDI, (No. 34) UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up near the temple of Chapparamaṭha Gōpālakrishṇadeva.

This record registers a gift of land by Kōṭiyaṇṇa of Hāruḷahaḷḷi, nephew (aḷiya) of [Chammu]-Bhaṇḍārināyaka for feeding brāḥmaṇas on certain occasions, probably in a maṭha. The gift land appears to have been purchased by the donor. It refers to Bemmaṇa [Kuva]ri Toḷaha who appears to have been in charge of the area, enjoying it as kumāravṛitti.
It is dated Śaka 13[3]6, Jaya, Mēsha, other details of date not being give. It corresponds to 1414-15 A.D.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipataE namaḥ . namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravē
trailōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śaka
varuṣa 1336 neya jayasaṁvatsarada mēṣa māsadalu beṁmaṇakuvari toḷahara kāladalu hosa
seya kumāra vrittiyalu hāruḷahaḷliya caṁmu bhaṁḍārināyakara Aḷiya koṭiyaṁṇaru māḍida dharmada
ge toḷahara kayali koṭiyaṁṇa kuhana mūlavakoṁḍa bāḷiva catuśīmeya vivara
mūḍalu Aṁkubāra cakūra kaḷa gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu hosabu kuṁjana niṁjuṁkaḷa gaḍiyiṁ
baḍagalu paḍuvalu sāliṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu hosabu kuṁjana mūlada goḍugadeyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu
yiṁtī catuśīmeyoḷaguḷaṁthā bayalu makki maranakkiyiḍalu hāḍihakalu sahitavāgi yī bāḷanu brāhmara bhōjana
naḍavadharma dinaṁprati Obba brāhmaṇaṁge Aśanavanu Aṁnaśudhi majige Eraḍu mēlōgara sahita bhōjanavanu na
ḍasi baharu yī bāḷiṁge teṟubasagi Aṇatu hosabukāri
toḷaharu māḍikoṭarāgi yī bāḷina sarvvamānyadali bāḷuvaru yī dharmavanu suvaru
yiṁtapudake yiṁtapudake sākṣigaḷu mārahaḷiya dēvarāḷu
mārahaḷiya Ayi nūṟaṟa huruḷahaḷiya nāyaka hosabukuṁja Ūru nālvaru
karavara saṁnidhiyali barasidaṁthā śāsana yīdharmmau Ācaṁdrārkkavāgi naḍaudu yi dharmava māḍida
du kuranu māḍida dharmada bāḷina vivara bēhaḷiya bayaloḷage Ā gadeya teṁkaṇa bayala gade 1 kaṁ bittu
va bede gaṇagilu hā Aṟuvattu Ā gadeyanu brāhmaru bitti naḍasuva dharma Amasege Obba brāhmaṇaṁge dvādasige
Obba brāhmaṇaṁge bhōjanavanu naḍasi bahudu yī dharmau Ā caṁdrārkkavāgi naḍaudu . śubhamastu śrī .
na viṣaṁ viṣamityāhuḥ brahmasvaṁ viṣamucyatē viṣamaikākinaṁ haṁti brahmasvaṁ putra pautrikaṁ . svadattāṁ
paradattāṁ vāṁ yō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ śaṣṭirvaruśa sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi . svadattā dvigu
ṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ paradattāpaharēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavētu . śrī .
Digital edition of SII 27.355 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
